`SubchunkMeshingSnapshot` + `SubchunkMeshingOutput`, immutable target/border block capture for one subchunk rebuild, and per-subchunk `Revision`/`BuildVersion` tagging for stale-result rejection\\\\n- `WorldHost` now builds meshing snapshots for dirty subchunks without mutating chunk residency and validates snapshot completion against revision/build-version state\\\\n- `WorldHost` now also supports one-step `TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out snapshot)` so the next stable dirty claim can hand back a ready meshing snapshot immediately while preserving queued state and stale-result safety\\\\n- Added scheduler-facing meshing helpers in `WorldHost` for claimed snapshots: build/validate `SubchunkMeshingOutput` against target + revision + buildVersion and complete or reject without renderer coupling\\\\n- Accepted `SubchunkMeshingOutput` is now cached per subchunk, exposed via `WorldHost.TryGetBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutput(...)`, invalidated immediately when later edits dirty that subchunk again, and can be enumerated in stable chunk/subchunk order via `WorldHost.EnumerateBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputs()`\\\\n- Added one-shot scheduler-facing drain pickup via `WorldHost.TryDrainNextBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutput(out output)`, preserving stable `chunkX -> chunkZ -> subchunkIndex` order while ensuring each accepted output is drained at most once until that subchunk is rebuilt\\\\n- Added lightweight validation runner at `tests/MiniCRUFT.World.Tests/Program.cs` covering same-seed chunk equality, negative coordinate mapping, world-space block working on complex tasks, follow this simple planning workflow:\\n\\n### 1. Complex Multistep Tasks \\u2192 Always Plan First\\n- Create plan in `meta/plans/[task-name].md`\\n- Break down into clear, actionable steps\\n- Update progress as you complete each step\\n\\n### 2. Plan Structure Template\\n\\n```markdown\\n---\\nSECTION_ID: plans.[category].[task_name]\\nTYPE: plan\\nSTATUS: in_progress\\nPRIORITY: high\\n---\\n\\n# [Task Name]\\n\\nGOAL: [Clear objective statement]\\nTIMELINE: [Expected timeframe]\\n\\n## Task Checklist\\n\\n### Phase 1: [Phase Name]\\n- [ ] Step 1 description\\n- [*] Step 2 description (currently working on)\\n- [x] Completed step (marked with x)\\n\\n### Phase 2: [Phase Name]\\n- [ ] Step 1 description\\n- [ ] Step 2 description\\n\\n## Success Criteria\\n- [ ] Criterion 1\\n- [ ] Criterion 2\\n```\\n\\n### 3. Planning Best Practices\\n\\n**DO:**\\n- Break large tasks into phases with 3-5 steps each\\n- Use progress markers: `- [ ]` (todo), `- [*]` or `- [in progress]` (active), `- [x]` (done), `- [skipped]`, `- [skipped: reason]` (explicit reason preferred)\\n- Update STATUS field (planned \\u2192 in_progress \\u2192 completed)\\n- **Update plan DURING execution, not after** - mark steps as in-progress when you start them\\n- Reference related sections using `[#section.id]` format\\n\\n**DON'T:**\\n- Skip planning for complex multistep work\\n- Create overly detailed plans that become maintenance overhead\\n- Forget to update progress as you work\\n\\n### 4. When to Plan\\n\\n**Always plan for:**\\n- Multi-file modifications\\n- New feature implementations\\n- Refactoring tasks\\n- Integration work\\n- Complex debugging sessions\\n\\n**Simple tasks don't need plans:**\\n- Single file edits\\n- Documentation updates\\n- Bug fixes with clear scope\\n\\n### 5. Real-Time Progress Updates\\n\\n**CRITICAL: Update your plan as you work, not after completion!**\\n\\n**When starting a step:**\\n- Mark it as `[*]` or `[in progress]` immediately\\n- Update any relevant notes or discoveries\\n\\n**During execution:**\\n- Add discovered subtasks as they come up\\n- Document blockers or changes in approach\\n- Update STATUS field when phases change\\n\\n**When completing a step:**\\n- Mark it as `[x]` \\n- Move to next step and mark it `[*]` if starting immediately\\n\\n**Progress Markers:**\\n- `[ ]` - Not started\\n- `[*]` - Currently working on (preferred)\\n- `[in progress]` - Currently working on (alternative)\\n- `[x]` - Completed\\n- `[skipped]` - Skipped (no further action required)\\n- `[skipped: reason]` - Skipped with explicit reason (preferred)\\n\\nThis keeps the plan as a living document that accurately reflects current progress and helps with context switching.\\n\\n### 6. Plan Completion\\n\\n- When all steps are either `[x]` or `[skipped]`/`[skipped: reason]`, set `STATUS: completed`.\\n- If any step returns to active, revert `STATUS` to `in_progress`.\\n\\n### 7. Efficiency Guidelines\\n\\n**BE EFFICIENT - NO BRAGGING ABOUT PLAN UPDATES:**\\n- Use tools to update plans quickly and silently\\n- Don't waste time explaining what you're updating in the plan\\n- Update the plan file and immediately move to the next task\\n- No commentary like \\\"I'm now updating the plan to reflect...\\\" or \\\"Let me mark this step as complete...\\\"\\n- Just do it and continue with actual work\\n\\n**Action over words:** Update plans with tools, then focus on delivering results.\\n\\n\", \"content_length\": 3266, \"message\": \"# Planning Instructions\\n\\n## Quick Reference\\n\\nWhen working on complex tasks, follow this simple planning workflow:\\n\\n### 1. Complex Multistep Tasks \\u2192 Always Plan First\\n- Create plan in `meta/plans/[task-name].md`\\n- Break down into clear, actionable steps\\n- Update progress as you complete each step\\n\\n### 2. Plan Structure Template\\n\\n```markdown\\n---\\nSECTION_ID: plans.[category].[task_name]\\nTYPE: plan\\nSTATUS: in_progress\\nPRIORITY: high\\n---\\n\\n# [Task Name]\\n\\nGOAL: [Clear objective statement]\\nTIMELINE: [Expected timeframe]\\n\\n## Task Checklist\\n\\n### Phase 1: [Phase Name]\\n- [ ] Step 1 description\\n- [*] Step 2 description (currently working on)\\n- [x] Completed step (marked with x)\\n\\n### Phase 2: [Phase Name]\\n- [ ] Step 1 description\\n- [ ] Step 2 description\\n\\n## Success Criteria\\n- [ ] Criterion 1\\n- [ ] Criterion 2\\n```\\n\\n### 3. Planning Best Practices\\n\\n**DO:**\\n- Break large tasks into phases with 3-5 steps each\\n- Use progress markers: `- [ ]` (todo), `- [*]` or `- [in progress]` (active), `- [x]` (done), `- [skipped]`, `- [skipped: reason]` (explicit reason preferred)\\n- Update STATUS field (planned \\u2192 in_progress \\u2192 completed)\\n- **Update plan DURING execution, not after** - mark steps as in-progress when you start them\\n- Reference related sections using `[#section.id]` format\\n\\n**DON'T:**\\n- Skip planning for complex multistep work\\n- Create overly detailed plans that become maintenance overhead\\n- Forget to update progress as you work\\n\\n### 4. When to Plan\\n\\n**Always plan for:**\\n- Multi-file modifications\\n- New feature implementations\\n- Refactoring tasks\\n- Integration work\\n- Complex debugging sessions\\n\\n**Simple tasks don't need plans:**\\n- Single file edits\\n- Documentation updates\\n- Bug fixes with clear scope\\n\\n### 5. Real-Time Progress Updates\\n\\n**CRITICAL: Update your plan as you work, not after completion!**\\n\\n**When starting a step:**\\n- Mark it as `[*]` or `[in progress]` immediately\\n- Update any relevant notes or discoveries\\n\\n**During execution:**\\n- Add discovered subtasks as they come up\\n- Document blockers or changes in approach\\n- Update STATUS field when phases change\\n\\n**When completing a step:**\\n- Mark it as `[x]` \\n- Move to next step and mark it `[*]` if starting immediately\\n\\n**Progress Markers:**\\n- `[ ]` - Not started\\n- `[*]` - Currently working on (preferred)\\n- `[in progress]` - Currently working on (alternative)\\n- `[x]` - Completed\\n- `[skipped]` - Skipped (no further action required)\\n- `[skipped: reason]` - Skipped with explicit reason (preferred)\\n\\nThis keeps the plan as a living document that accurately reflects current progress and helps with context switching.\\n\\n### 6. Plan Completion\\n\\n- When all steps are either `[x]` or `[skipped]`/`[skipped: reason]`, set `STATUS: completed`.\\n- If any step returns to active, revert `STATUS` to `in_progress`.\\n\\n### 7.     }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    private static BlockId GetSnapshotBlock(BlockId[] blocks, int x, int y, int z)\\\\n    {\\\\n        return blocks[x + (z * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize) + (y * subchunkBaseY = subchunkIndex * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize;\\\\n\\\\n        for (var localY = 0; localY < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localY++)\\\\n        {\\\\n            for (var localZ = 0; localZ < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localZ++)\\\\n            {\\\\n                for (var localX = 0; localX < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localX++)\\\\n                {\\\\n BlockId.Air)\\\\n                    {\\\\n                        continue;\\\\n                    }\\\\n\\\\n                    var worldX = chunk.Coordinate.OriginX + localCoordinate.X;\\\\n                    var worldY = localCoordinate.Y;\\\\n                    var worldZ = chunk.Coordinate.OriginZ + localCoordinate.Z;\\\\n\\\\n                    foreach (BlockFace face in Enum.GetValues<BlockFace>())\\\\n                    {\\\\n                        if (world.IsBlockFaceVisible(worldX, worldY, worldZ, face))\\\\n                        {\\\\n                            yield return new VisibleBlockFace(worldX, worldY, worldZ, localCoordinate, blockId, face);\\\\n                        }\\\\n                    }\\\\n                }\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    public static IEnumerable<VisibleBlockFace> EnumerateVisibleFaces(SubchunkMeshingSnapshot snapshot)\\\\n    {\\\\n        ValidateSnapshot(snapshot);\\\\n\\\\n        var localZ = 0; localZ < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localZ++)\\\\n            {\\\\n                for (var localX = 0; localX < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localX++)\\\\n                {\\\\n                    var blockId = GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY, localZ);\\\\n                    if (blockId == BlockId.Air)\\\\n                    {\\\\n                        continue;\\\\n                    }\\\\n\\\\n                    var localCoordinate = new LocalBlockCoordinate(localX, subchunkBaseY + localY, localZ);\\\\n                    var worldX =       }\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    private static bool IsOccluded(SubchunkMeshingSnapshot snapshot, int localX, int localY, int localZ, BlockFace face)\\\\n    {\\\\n GetBorderBlock(snapshot.PositiveZBorder, localX, localY)\\\\n                : GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY, localZ + 1),\\\\n            _ => BlockId.Air\\\\n        };\\\\n\\\\n        return neighborBlock != BlockId.Air;\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    private static void ValidateSnapshot(SubchunkMeshingSnapshot snapshot)\\\\n    {\\\\n        if ((uint)snapshot.SubchunkIndex >= ChunkConstants.SubchunkCountPerChunk)\\\\n        {\\\\n            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(snapshot.SubchunkIndex));\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        var blockCount = ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize;\\\\n        var borderCount = ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize;\\\\n\\\\n ValidateLength(snapshot.PositiveXBorder, borderCount, nameof(snapshot.PositiveXBorder));\\\\n        ValidateLength(snapshot.NegativeYBorder, borderCount, nameof(snapshot.NegativeYBorder));\\\\n   ValidateLength(snapshot.PositiveZBorder, borderCount, nameof(snapshot.PositiveZBorder));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    private static void ValidateLength(BlockId[] blocks, int expectedLength, string paramName)\\\\n    {\\\\n        if (blocks.Length != expectedLength)\\\\n        {\\\\n            throw new ArgumentException($\\\\\\\"Expected {expectedLength} entries.\\\\\\\", paramName);\\\\n        }\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    private static BlockId GetSnapshotBlock(BlockId[] blocks, int x, int y, int z)\\\\n    {\\\\n        return blocks[x + (z * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize) + (y * BlockFace.PositiveX));\\n        Assert.True(host.IsBlockFaceVisible(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.NegativeX));\\n        Assert.False(host.TryGetNeighbor(0, 0, 0, BlockFace.NegativeY, out _));\\n    }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void DirtyAndMeshStatePropagateAtSubchunkBoundaries()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(3333);\\n\\n        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\n        var current = chunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\n        var below = chunk.GetSubchunk(0);\\n        var leftChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\n        var left = leftChunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\n\\n        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n        below.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n        left.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n\\n        host.SetBlock(0, 16, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\n\\n        Assert.True(current.IsDirty, \\\"Current subchunk should become dirty after edit.\\\");\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, current.MeshState);\\n        Assert.True(below.IsDirty, \\\"Adjacent Y-neighbor subchunk should become dirty at subchunk seam.\\\");\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, below.MeshState);\\n        Assert.True(left.IsDirty, \\\"Adjacent X-neighbor chunk subchunk should become dirty at chunk seam.\\\");\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, left.MeshState);\\n\\n        current.MarkMeshQueued();\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, current.MeshState);\\n        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n        Assert.False(current.IsDirty);\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, current.MeshState);\\n    }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void DirtySubchunksCanBeDiscoveredAndClaimedForRebuildInStableOrder()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4443);\\n\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\n        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\n        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\n\\n        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\n        {\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\n            {\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\n\\n        var dirty = host.EnumerateDirtySubchunks()\\n            .Select(entry => (entry.Chunk.Coordinate, entry.SubchunkIndex))\\n            .ToList();\\n\\n        Assert.Equal(4, dirty.Count);\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 0), dirty[0]);\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 1), dirty[1]);\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), 1), dirty[2]);\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), 1), dirty[3]);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var firstChunk, out var firstSubchunkIndex));\\n        Assert.NotNull(firstChunk);\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), firstChunk!.Coordinate);\\n        Assert.Equal(0, firstSubchunkIndex);\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var secondChunk, out var secondSubchunkIndex));\\n        Assert.NotNull(secondChunk);\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), secondChunk!.Coordinate);\\n        Assert.Equal(1, secondSubchunkIndex);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, out var firstSnapshot));\\n        Assert.NotNull(firstSnapshot);\\n        Assert.True(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, firstSnapshot!.Revision, firstSnapshot.BuildVersion));\\n        Assert.False(firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).IsDirty);\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var thirdChunk, out var thirdSubchunkIndex));\\n        Assert.NotNull(thirdChunk);\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), thirdChunk!.Coordinate);\\n        Assert.Equal(1, thirdSubchunkIndex);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var fourthChunk, out var fourthSubchunkIndex));\\n        Assert.NotNull(fourthChunk);\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), fourthChunk!.Coordinate);\\n        Assert.Equal(1, fourthSubchunkIndex);\\n\\n        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out _, out _));\\n        Assert.False(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(99, 99, 0, 1, 0));\\n    }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void ClaimNextDirtyCanReturnAReadyMeshingSnapshotInStableOrder()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4447);\\n\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\n        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\n        var southChunk = Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out _));\\n    }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void ClaimNextDirtySnapshotResultsStillRejectStaleRevisions()\\n    {\\n        var host = new }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void MeshingSchedulerProcessesDirtySnapshotsWithinBudget()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4459);\\n\\n        var westChunk = originChunk })\\n        {\\n            chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\n            chunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\n\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\n            {\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        host.SetBlock(-15, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\n        host.SetBlock(1, 17, 1, BlockId.Dirt);\\n\\n BuiltMeshingOutputsCanBeDrainedOnceInStableChunkSubchunkOrder()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4456);\\n\\n        var westChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void RendererPickupLoopConsumesSchedulerBuiltOutputsInOnePass()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4458);\\n\\n        var westChunk ClaimedSnapshotMeshingHelperRejectsWrongTargetOutput()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4451);\\n\\n        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\n        chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\n        chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MarkMeshBuilt();\\n\\n        host.SetBlock(1, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var snapshot));\\n        Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\n\\n        var validOutput = SubchunkMeshing.BuildOutput(snapshot!);\\n        var validOutput));\\n    }\\n\\n    [Fact]\\n    public void MeshingSnapshotCapturesSeamDataAcrossChunkAndSubchunkBoundaries()\\n    {\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\n        host.Initialize(4445);\\n\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\n        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\n\\n        originChunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\n        originChunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\n        eastChunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\n\\n        foreach (var subchunk in new[] { originChunk.GetSubchunk(0), originChunk.GetSubchunk(1), eastChunk.GetSubchunk(0) })\\n        {\\n            subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\n        }\\n\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 15, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\n        host.SetBlock(16, 15, 0, BlockId.Dirt);\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 0, BlockId.Grass);\\n\\n        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(0, 0, 0, out var snapshot));\\n        Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\n\\n        var visibleFaces = SubchunkMeshing.BuildVisibleFaces(snapshot!);\\n        var targetFaces = visibleFaces.Where(face => face.WorldX == 15 && face.WorldY == 15 && face.WorldZ == 0).ToList();\\n        var worldTargetFaces = SubchunkMeshing.EnumerateVisibleFaces(host, originChunk, 0)\\n            .Where(face => face.WorldX == 15 && face.WorldY == 15 && face.WorldZ == 0)\\n            .ToList();\\n\\n        Assert.Equal(worldTargetFaces.Count, targetFaces.Count);\\n        Assert.Equal(\\n            string.Join(',', worldTargetFaces.Select(face => var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(3333);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var current = chunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+        var below = chunk.GetSubchunk(0);\\\\n+        var leftChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n+        var left = leftChunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        below.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        left.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(0, 16, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(current.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Current subchunk should become dirty after edit.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(below.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent Y-neighbor subchunk should become dirty at subchunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, below.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(left.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent X-neighbor chunk subchunk should become dirty at chunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, left.MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshQueued();\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        Assert.False(current.IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, current.MeshState);\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void DirtySubchunksCanBeDiscoveredAndClaimedForRebuildInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4443);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n+        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var dirty = host.EnumerateDirtySubchunks()\\\\n+            .Select(entry => (entry.Chunk.Coordinate, entry.SubchunkIndex))\\\\n+            .ToList();\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(4, dirty.Count);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), 1), dirty[3]);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var firstChunk, out var firstSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), firstChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(0, firstSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var secondChunk, out var secondSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(secondChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), secondChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, secondSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, out var firstSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstSnapshot);\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, firstSnapshot!.Revision, firstSnapshot.BuildVersion));\\\\n+        Assert.False(firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var thirdChunk, out var thirdSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(thirdChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), thirdChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, thirdSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var fourthChunk, out var fourthSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(fourthChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), fourthChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, fourthSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out _, out _));\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(99, 99, 0, 1, 0));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimNextDirtyCanReturnAReadyMeshingSnapshotInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+ NeighborAndBlockFaceHelpersResolveAcrossChunkBoundaries()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(2222);\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0).GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+        host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0).GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+        host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1).GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+        host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, -1).GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 10, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(16, 10, 15, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 10, 16, BlockId.Grass);\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(-1, 9, -1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(-1, 10, -1, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var eastNeighbor = host.GetNeighbor(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.PositiveX);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), eastNeighbor.ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new LocalBlockCoordinate(0, 10, 15), eastNeighbor.LocalCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(BlockId.Dirt, eastNeighbor.BlockId);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var southNeighbor = host.GetNeighbor(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.PositiveZ);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), southNeighbor.ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new LocalBlockCoordinate(15, 10, 0), southNeighbor.LocalCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(BlockId.Grass, southNeighbor.BlockId);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var downNeighbor = host.GetNeighbor(-1, 10, -1, BlockFace.NegativeY);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(-1, -1), downNeighbor.ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new LocalBlockCoordinate(15, 9, 15), downNeighbor.LocalCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(BlockId.Stone, downNeighbor.BlockId);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.IsBlockFaceVisible(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.PositiveX));\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.IsBlockFaceVisible(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.NegativeX));\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryGetNeighbor(0, 0, 0, BlockFace.NegativeY, out _));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void DirtyAndMeshStatePropagateAtSubchunkBoundaries()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(3333);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var current = chunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+        var below = chunk.GetSubchunk(0);\\\\n+        var leftChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n+        var left = leftChunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        below.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        left.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(0, 16, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(current.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Current subchunk should become dirty after edit.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(below.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent Y-neighbor subchunk should become dirty at subchunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, below.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(left.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent X-neighbor chunk subchunk should become dirty at chunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, left.MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshQueued();\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        Assert.False(current.IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, current.MeshState);\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void DirtySubchunksCanBeDiscoveredAndClaimedForRebuildInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4443);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n+        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var dirty = host.EnumerateDirtySubchunks()\\\\n+            .Select(entry => (entry.Chunk.Coordinate, entry.SubchunkIndex))\\\\n+            .ToList();\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(4, dirty.Count);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 0), dirty[0]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 1), dirty[1]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), 1), dirty[2]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), 1), dirty[3]);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var firstChunk, out var firstSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), firstChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(0, firstSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var secondChunk, out var secondSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(secondChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), secondChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, secondSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, out var firstSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstSnapshot);\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, firstSnapshot!.Revision, firstSnapshot.BuildVersion));\\\\n+        Assert.False(firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var thirdChunk, out var thirdSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(thirdChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), thirdChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, thirdSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var fourthChunk, out var fourthSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(fourthChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), fourthChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, fourthSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out _, out _));\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(99, 99, 0, 1, 0));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimNextDirtyCanReturnAReadyMeshingSnapshotInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+ RendererPickupLoopConsumesSchedulerBuiltOutputsInOnePass()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4458);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var westChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var scheduler = new WorldMeshingScheduler();\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { westChunk, originChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+            chunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(-15, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+ var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(3333);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var current = chunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+        var below = chunk.GetSubchunk(0);\\\\n+        var leftChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n+        var left = leftChunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        below.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        left.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(0, 16, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(current.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Current subchunk should become dirty after edit.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(below.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent Y-neighbor subchunk should become dirty at subchunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, below.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(left.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent X-neighbor chunk subchunk should become dirty at chunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, left.MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshQueued();\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        Assert.False(current.IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, current.MeshState);\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void DirtySubchunksCanBeDiscoveredAndClaimedForRebuildInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4443);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n+        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var dirty = host.EnumerateDirtySubchunks()\\\\n+            .Select(entry => (entry.Chunk.Coordinate, entry.SubchunkIndex))\\\\n+            .ToList();\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(4, dirty.Count);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 0), dirty[0]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 1), dirty[1]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), 1), dirty[2]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), 1), dirty[3]);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var firstChunk, out var firstSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), firstChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(0, firstSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var secondChunk, out var secondSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(secondChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), secondChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, secondSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, out var firstSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstSnapshot);\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, firstSnapshot!.Revision, firstSnapshot.BuildVersion));\\\\n+        Assert.False(firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var thirdChunk, out var thirdSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(thirdChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), thirdChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, thirdSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var fourthChunk, out var fourthSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(fourthChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), fourthChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, fourthSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out _, out _));\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(99, 99, 0, 1, 0));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimNextDirtyCanReturnAReadyMeshingSnapshotInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4447);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n+        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var claimedSnapshots = new List<SubchunkMeshingSnapshot>();\\\\n+        while (host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var snapshot))\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\\\n+            claimedSnapshots.Add(snapshot!);\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(4, claimedSnapshots.Count);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), claimedSnapshots[0].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(0, claimedSnapshots[0].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), claimedSnapshots[1].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[1].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), claimedSnapshots[2].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[2].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), claimedSnapshots[3].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[3].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var snapshot in claimedSnapshots)\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, host.GetOrCreateChunk(snapshot.ChunkCoordinate.X, snapshot.ChunkCoordinate.Z).GetSubchunk(snapshot.SubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out _));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimNextDirtySnapshotResultsStillRejectStaleRevisions()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4448);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+        chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(1, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var staleSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(staleSnapshot);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var staleOutput = new SubchunkMeshingOutput(\\\\n+            staleSnapshot!.ChunkCoordinate,\\\\n+            staleSnapshot.SubchunkIndex,\\\\n+            staleSnapshot.Revision,\\\\n+            staleSnapshot.BuildVersion,\\\\n+            SubchunkMeshing.BuildVisibleFaces(staleSnapshot));\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(2, 1, 1, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryCompleteSubchunkMeshing(staleOutput));\\\\n+        Assert.True(chunk.GetSubchunk(0).IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var freshSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(freshSnapshot);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var freshOutput = new SubchunkMeshingOutput(\\\\n+            freshSnapshot!.ChunkCoordinate,\\\\n+            freshSnapshot.SubchunkIndex,\\\\n+            freshSnapshot.Revision,\\\\n+            freshSnapshot.BuildVersion,\\\\n+            SubchunkMeshing.BuildVisibleFaces(freshSnapshot));\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryCompleteSubchunkMeshing(freshOutput));\\\\n+        Assert.False(chunk.GetSubchunk(0).IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(freshSnapshot.Revision, chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Revision);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(freshSnapshot.BuildVersion + 1, chunk.GetSubchunk(0).BuildVersion);\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimedSnapshotMeshingHelperAcceptsCurrentOutput()\\\\n+ var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(3333);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var current = chunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+        var below = chunk.GetSubchunk(0);\\\\n+        var leftChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n+        var left = leftChunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        below.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        left.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(0, 16, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(current.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Current subchunk should become dirty after edit.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(below.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent Y-neighbor subchunk should become dirty at subchunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, below.MeshState);\\\\n+        Assert.True(left.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent X-neighbor chunk subchunk should become dirty at chunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, left.MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshQueued();\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, current.MeshState);\\\\n+        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+        Assert.False(current.IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, current.MeshState);\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void DirtySubchunksCanBeDiscoveredAndClaimedForRebuildInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4443);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n+        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var dirty = host.EnumerateDirtySubchunks()\\\\n+            .Select(entry => (entry.Chunk.Coordinate, entry.SubchunkIndex))\\\\n+            .ToList();\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(4, dirty.Count);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 0), dirty[0]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 1), dirty[1]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), 1), dirty[2]);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), 1), dirty[3]);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var firstChunk, out var firstSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), firstChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(0, firstSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var secondChunk, out var secondSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(secondChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), secondChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, secondSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, out var firstSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(firstSnapshot);\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, firstSnapshot!.Revision, firstSnapshot.BuildVersion));\\\\n+        Assert.False(firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).IsDirty);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var thirdChunk, out var thirdSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(thirdChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), thirdChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, thirdSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var fourthChunk, out var fourthSubchunkIndex));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(fourthChunk);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), fourthChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, fourthSubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out _, out _));\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(99, 99, 0, 1, 0));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimNextDirtyCanReturnAReadyMeshingSnapshotInStableOrder()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4447);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n+        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n+            {\\\\n+                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+            }\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var claimedSnapshots = new List<SubchunkMeshingSnapshot>();\\\\n+        while (host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var snapshot))\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\\\n+            claimedSnapshots.Add(snapshot!);\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(4, claimedSnapshots.Count);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), claimedSnapshots[0].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(0, claimedSnapshots[0].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), claimedSnapshots[1].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[1].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), claimedSnapshots[2].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[2].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), claimedSnapshots[3].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[3].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n+\\\\n+        foreach (var snapshot in claimedSnapshots)\\\\n+        {\\\\n+            Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, host.GetOrCreateChunk(snapshot.ChunkCoordinate.X, snapshot.ChunkCoordinate.Z).GetSubchunk(snapshot.SubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n+        }\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out _));\\\\n+    }\\\\n+\\\\n+    [Fact]\\\\n+    public void ClaimNextDirtySnapshotResultsStillRejectStaleRevisions()\\\\n+    {\\\\n+        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n+        host.Initialize(4448);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n+        chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n+        chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n+\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(1, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n+\\\\n+        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var staleSnapshot));\\\\n+        Assert.NotNull(staleSnapshot);\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, chunk.GetSubchunk(0).MeshState);\\\\n+\\\\n+        var staleOutput = new SubchunkMeshingOutput(\\\\n+ plan\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# MiniCRUFT World Core Phase 2\\\\n\\\\nGOAL: Implement the smallest useful world-core slice in `MiniCRUFT.World` that establishes deterministic chunk data, subchunk storage, coordinate helpers, and chunk retrieval from `WorldHost`.\\\\nTIMELINE: current session\\\\n\\\\n## Task Checklist\\\\n\\\\n### Phase 1: Model boundaries\\\\n- [x] Confirm exact minimal world-core file set\\\\n- [x] Confirm safe interfaces for `Game -> World`\\\\n\\\\n### Phase 2: World data model\\\\n- [x] Add `BlockId` baseline\\\\n- [x] Add chunk coordinate and local block coordinate helpers\\\\n- [x] Add dense `Subchunk` storage\\\\n- [x] Add `Chunk` with 8 subchunks\\\\n- [x] Add `ChunkState` enum\\\\n\\\\n### Phase 3: World behavior\\\\n- [x] Add deterministic simple generator\\\\n- [x] Add `WorldHost.GetOrCreateChunk(x, z)`\\\\n- [x] Add basic world counters/debug-friendly state\\\\n\\\\n### Phase 4: Validation\\\\n- [x] Validate same seed => same chunk contents\\\\n- [x] Validate negative-coordinate mapping and world-space block helpers\\\\n- [x] Validate chunk dimensions/constants usage stays correct\\\\n- [x] Update next-step backlog\\\\n\\\\n## Decisions\\\\n- Keep the slice inside `MiniCRUFT.World` only unless a tiny `Game` touch is required\\\\n- Prefer flat/simple deterministic terrain first; avoid caves/features for now\\\\n- Dense storage first, no palette compression yet\\\\n- Preserve `16x16x128` chunk and `16x16x16` subchunk boundaries\\\\n\\\\n## Owners\\\\n- Cody: implementation\\\\n- Archy: boundary review\\\\n\\\\n## Success Criteria\\\\n- [x] World data model exists and compiles\\\\n- [x] `WorldHost` can return deterministic chunk instances by coordinate\\\\n- [x] No renderer/persistence coupling is introduced\\\\n- [x] The result is a clean base for later meshing/streaming/save-load work\\\\n\\\\n## Current Checkpoint\\\\n- Added minimal world-core types in `MiniCRUFT.World`: `BlockId`, `ChunkCoordinate`, `LocalBlockCoordinate`, `Subchunk`, `Chunk`, `ChunkState`, `WorldGenerator`\\\\n- Current work: implement a real meshing scheduler loop, migrate the lightweight validation runner to xUnit, and add integration-style renderer pickup validations while preserving one-way renderer pickup via `WorldHost.TryDrainNextBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutput(...)` and stable `chunkX -> chunkZ -> subchunkIndex` drain semantics\\\\n- Added tiny renderer-side pickup state in `MiniCRUFT.Rendering.RendererHost`: `PickupBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputs(WorldHost world)` drains ready outputs in one pass and caches the latest uploaded output per `(chunk, subchunk)` without reaching into world internals beyond the drain contract\\\\n- App wiring now calls the renderer pickup loop after `game.Update()` via `renderer.PickupBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputs(game.World)`; the `GameHost.World` exposure is intentionally tiny and used only as the app-level bridge\\\\n- `WorldHost` now owns chunk cache, seed-aware initialization, deterministic `GetOrCreateChunk(x, z)`, world-space `GetBlock`/`SetBlock` helpers, `TryGetBlock`, neighbor/block-face helpers, and simple counters\\\\n- Added explicit per-subchunk mesh state via `SubchunkMeshState` and dirty propagation across chunk/subchunk seams after world edits\\\\n- Added meshing-base types/APIs: `BlockFace`, `BlockNeighbor`, `VisibleBlockFace`, `SubchunkMeshing`\\\\n- Added minimal rebuild-queue plumbing in `WorldHost`: stable dirty-subchunk discovery, next-dirty claim, and build completion marking without renderer coupling\\\\n- Added renderer-agnostic meshing snapshot contract in `MiniCRUFT.World`: `SubchunkMeshingSnapshot` + `SubchunkMeshingOutput`, immutable target/border block capture for one subchunk rebuild, and per-subchunk `Revision`/`BuildVersion` tagging for stale-result rejection\\\\n- `WorldHost` now builds meshing snapshots for dirty subchunks without mutating chunk residency and validates snapshot completion against revision/build-version state\\\\n- `WorldHost` now also supports one-step `TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out snapshot)` so the next stable dirty claim can hand back a ready meshing snapshot immediately while preserving queued state and stale-result safety\\\\n- Added scheduler-facing meshing helpers in `WorldHost` for claimed snapshots: build/validate coupling\\\\\\\\n- Added renderer-agnostic meshing snapshot contract in `MiniCRUFT.World`: `SubchunkMeshingSnapshot` + `SubchunkMeshingOutput`, immutable target/border block capture for one subchunk rebuild, and per-subchunk `Revision`/`BuildVersion` tagging for stale-result rejection\\\\\\\\n- `WorldHost` now builds meshing snapshots for dirty subchunks without mutating chunk residency and validates snapshot completion against revision/build-version state\\\\\\\\n- `WorldHost` now also supports one-step `TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out snapshot)` so the next stable dirty claim can hand back a ready meshing snapshot immediately while preserving queued state and stale-result safety\\\\\\\\n- Added scheduler-facing meshing helpers in `WorldHost` for claimed snapshots: build/validate `SubchunkMeshingOutput` against target + revision + buildVersion and complete or reject without renderer coupling\\\\\\\\n- Accepted `SubchunkMeshingOutput` is now cached per subchunk, exposed via `WorldHost.TryGetBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutput(...)`, invalidated immediately when later edits dirty that subchunk again, and can be enumerated in stable chunk/subchunk order via `WorldHost.EnumerateBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputs()`\\\\\\\\n- Added one-shot scheduler-facing drain pickup via `WorldHost.TryDrainNextBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutput(out output)`, preserving stable `chunkX -> chunkZ -> subchunkIndex` order while ensuring each accepted output is drained at most once until that subchunk is rebuilt\\\\\\\\n- Added lightweight validation runner at Plan Structure Template\\\\n\\\\n```markdown\\\\n---\\\\nSECTION_ID: plans.[category].[task_name]\\\\nTYPE: plan\\\\nSTATUS: in_progress\\\\nPRIORITY: high\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n# [Task Name]\\\\n\\\\nGOAL: [Clear objective statement]\\\\nTIMELINE: [Expected timeframe]\\\\n\\\\n## Task Checklist\\\\n\\\\n### Phase 1: [Phase Name]\\\\n- [ ] Step 1 description\\\\n- [*] Step 2 description (currently working on)\\\\n- [x] Completed step (marked with x)\\\\n\\\\n### Phase 2: [Phase Name]\\\\n- [ ] Step 1 description\\\\n- [ ] Step 2 description\\\\n\\\\n## Success Criteria\\\\n- [ ] Criterion 1\\\\n- [ ] Criterion 2\\\\n```\\\\n\\\\n### 3. Planning Best Practices\\\\n\\\\n**DO:**\\\\n- Break large tasks into phases with 3-5 steps each\\\\n- Use progress markers: `- [ ]` (todo), `- [*]` or `- [in progress]` (active), `- [x]` (done), `- [skipped]`, `- [skipped: reason]` (explicit reason preferred)\\\\n- Update STATUS field (planned \\\\u2192 in_progress \\\\u2192 completed)\\\\n- **Update plan DURING execution, not after** - mark steps as in-progress when you start them\\\\n- Reference related sections using `[#section.id]` format\\\\n\\\\n**DON'T:**\\\\n- Skip planning for complex multistep work\\\\n- Create overly detailed plans that become maintenance overhead\\\\n- Forget to update progress as you work\\\\n\\\\n### 4. When to Plan\\\\n\\\\n**Always plan for:**\\\\n- Multi-file modifications\\\\n- New feature implementations\\\\n- Refactoring tasks\\\\n- Integration work\\\\n- Complex debugging sessions\\\\n\\\\n**Simple tasks don't need plans:**\\\\n- Single file edits\\\\n- Documentation updates\\\\n- Bug fixes with clear scope\\\\n\\\\n### 5. Real-Time Progress Updates\\\\n\\\\n**CRITICAL: Update your plan as you work, not after completion!**\\\\n\\\\n**When starting a step:**\\\\n- Mark it as `[*]` or `[in progress]` immediately\\\\n- Update any relevant notes or discoveries\\\\n\\\\n**During execution:**\\\\n- Add discovered subtasks as they come up\\\\n- Document blockers or changes in approach\\\\n- Update STATUS field when phases change\\\\n\\\\n**When completing a step:**\\\\n- Mark it as `[x]` \\\\n- Move to next step and mark it `[*]` if starting immediately\\\\n\\\\n**Progress Markers:**\\\\n- `[ ]` - Not started\\\\n- `[*]` - Currently working on (preferred)\\\\n- `[in progress]` - Currently working on (alternative)\\\\n- `[x]` - Completed\\\\n- `[skipped]` - Skipped (no further action required)\\\\n- `[skipped: reason]` - Skipped with explicit reason (preferred)\\\\n\\\\nThis keeps the plan as a living document that accurately reflects current progress and helps with context switching.\\\\n\\\\n### 6. Plan Completion\\\\n\\\\n- When all steps are either `[x]` or `[skipped]`/`[skipped: reason]`, set `STATUS: completed`.\\\\n- If any step returns to active, revert `STATUS` to `in_progress`.\\\\n\\\\n### 7. Efficiency Guidelines\\\\n\\\\n**BE EFFICIENT - NO BRAGGING ABOUT PLAN UPDATES:**\\\\n- Use tools to update plans quickly and silently\\\\n- Don't waste time explaining what you're updating in the plan\\\\n- Update the plan file and immediately move to the next task\\\\n- No commentary like \\\\\\\"I'm now updating the plan to reflect...\\\\\\\" or \\\\\\\"Let me mark this step as complete...\\\\\\\"\\\\n- Just do it and continue with actual work\\\\n\\\\n**Action over words:** Update plans with tools, then focus on delivering results.\\\\n\\\\n\\\", \\\"content_length\\\": 3266, \\\"message\\\": \\\"# Planning Instructions\\\\n\\\\n## Quick Reference\\\\n\\\\nWhen working on complex tasks, follow this simple planning workflow:\\\\n\\\\n### 1. Planning Best Practices\\\\n\\\\n**DO:**\\\\n- Break large tasks into phases with 3-5 steps each\\\\n- Use progress markers: `- [ ]` (todo), `- [*]` or `- [in progress]` (active), `- [x]` (done), `- [skipped]`, `- [skipped: reason]` (explicit reason preferred)\\\\n- Update STATUS field (planned \\\\u2192 in_progress \\\\u2192 completed)\\\\n- **Update plan DURING execution, not after** - mark steps as in-progress when you start them\\\\n- Reference related sections using `[#section.id]` format\\\\n\\\\n**DON'T:**\\\\n- Skip planning for complex multistep work\\\\n- Create overly detailed plans that become maintenance overhead\\\\n- Forget to update progress as you work\\\\n\\\\n### 4.     {\\\\\\\\n            return false;\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        var subchunk = chunk.GetSubchunk(output.SubchunkIndex);\\\\\\\\n        if (subchunk.BuildVersion != EnumerateDirtyAndBuiltSubchunkOrder()\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n        foreach (var chunk in _chunks.OrderBy(entry => entry.Key.X).ThenBy(entry => entry.Key.Z).Select(entry => entry.Value))\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            for (var subchunkIndex = 0; subchunkIndex < ChunkConstants.SubchunkCountPerChunk; subchunkIndex++)\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                yield return (chunk, = chunk.GetSubchunk(claimedSnapshot.SubchunkIndex);\\\\\\\\n        return subchunk.MeshState == SubchunkMeshState.Queued\\\\\\\\n            && subchunk.Revision == claimedSnapshot.Revision\\\\\\\\n            && subchunk.BuildVersion == claimedSnapshot.BuildVersion;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private void MarkNeighborSubchunksDirty(Chunk chunk, LocalBlockCoordinate localCoordinate)\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n        if (localCoordinate.X == 0)\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            GetOrCreateChunk(chunk.Coordinate.X - 1,    {\\\\\\\\n            GetOrCreateChunk(chunk.Coordinate.X, chunk.Coordinate.Z - 1).MarkSubchunkDirty(localCoordinate.SubchunkIndex);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if (localCoordinate.Z == ChunkConstants.ChunkSizeZ - 1)\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            GetOrCreateChunk(chunk.Coordinate.X, chunk.Coordinate.Z + 1).MarkSubchunkDirty(localCoordinate.SubchunkIndex);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if (localCoordinate.SubchunkLocalY == 0 && localCoordinate.SubchunkIndex > 0)\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            chunk.MarkSubchunkDirty(localCoordinate.SubchunkIndex - 1)\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            chunk.MarkSubchunkDirty(localCoordinate.SubchunkIndex + 1);\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private SubchunkMeshingSnapshot CopyNegativeYBorder(chunk, subchunkIndex),\\\\\\\\n            CopyPositiveYBorder(chunk, subchunkIndex),\\\\\\\\n            CopyNegativeZBorder(chunk, subchunkIndex),\\\\\\\\n            CopyPositiveZBorder(chunk, subchunkIndex));\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private static BlockId[] CopySubchunkBlocks(Chunk chunk, int subchunkIndex)\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n        return chunk.GetSubchunk(subchunkIndex).AsSpan().ToArray();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private BlockId[] CopyNegativeXBorder(Chunk chunk, int subchunkIndex)\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n        var border = ChunkConstants.SubchunkCountPerChunk)\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(subchunkIndex));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        var subchunkBaseY = subchunkIndex * ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        for (var localY = 0; localY < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localY++)\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            for (var localZ = 0; localZ < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localZ++)\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\n                for (var localX = 0; localX < ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize; localX++)\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\n localCoordinate.Z;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n                    foreach (BlockFace face in Enum.GetValues<BlockFace>())\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\n                        if (world.IsBlockFaceVisible(worldX, worldY, worldZ, face))\\\\\\\\n                        {\\\\\\\\n                            yield return new VisibleBlockFace(worldX, worldY, worldZ, localCoordinate, blockId, face);\\\\\\\\n                        }\\\\\\\\n                    }\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n {\\\\\\\\n                    var blockId = GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY, localZ);\\\\\\\\n                    if (blockId == BlockId.Air)\\\\\\\\n                    {\\\\\\\\n IsOccluded(SubchunkMeshingSnapshot snapshot, int localX, int localY, int localZ, BlockFace face)\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n        var neighborBlock = face switch\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n            BlockFace.NegativeX => localX == 0\\\\\\\\n                ? GetBorderBlock(snapshot.PositiveXBorder, localY, localZ)\\\\\\\\n                : GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX + 1, localY, localZ),\\\\\\\\n            BlockFace.NegativeY => localY == 0\\\\\\\\n                ? GetBorderBlock(snapshot.NegativeYBorder, localX, localZ)\\\\\\\\n                : GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY - 1, localZ),\\\\\\\\n            BlockFace.PositiveY => localY == ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize - 1\\\\\\\\n                ? GetBorderBlock(snapshot.PositiveYBorder, localX, localZ)\\\\\\\\n                : GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY + 1, localZ),\\\\\\\\n            BlockFace.NegativeZ => localZ == 0\\\\\\\\n                ? GetBorderBlock(snapshot.NegativeZBorder, localX, localY)\\\\\\\\n                : GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY, localZ - 1),\\\\\\\\n            BlockFace.PositiveZ => localZ == ChunkConstants.SubchunkSize - 1\\\\\\\\n                ? GetBorderBlock(snapshot.PositiveZBorder, localX, localY)\\\\\\\\n                : GetSnapshotBlock(snapshot.Blocks, localX, localY, localZ + 1),\\\\\\\\n            _ => BlockId.Air\\\\\\\\n        };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        return neighborBlock != BlockId.Air;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    private static void ValidateSnapshot(SubchunkMeshingSnapshot snapshot)\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n downNeighbor.LocalCoordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(BlockId.Stone, downNeighbor.BlockId);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.False(host.IsBlockFaceVisible(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.PositiveX));\\\\n        Assert.True(host.IsBlockFaceVisible(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.NegativeX));\\\\n        Assert.False(host.TryGetNeighbor(0, 0, 0, BlockFace.NegativeY, out _));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void DirtyAndMeshStatePropagateAtSubchunkBoundaries()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(3333);\\\\n\\\\n        var chunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n        var current = chunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n        var below = chunk.GetSubchunk(0);\\\\n        var leftChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n        var left = leftChunk.GetSubchunk(1);\\\\n\\\\n        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n        below.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n        left.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n\\\\n        host.SetBlock(0, 16, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(current.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Current subchunk should become dirty after edit.\\\\\\\");\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, current.MeshState);\\\\n        Assert.True(below.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent Y-neighbor subchunk should become dirty at subchunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, below.MeshState);\\\\n        Assert.True(left.IsDirty, \\\\\\\"Adjacent X-neighbor chunk subchunk should become dirty at chunk seam.\\\\\\\");\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.NeedsBuild, left.MeshState);\\\\n\\\\n        current.MarkMeshQueued();\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, current.MeshState);\\\\n        current.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n        Assert.False(current.IsDirty);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, current.MeshState);\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void DirtySubchunksCanBeDiscoveredAndClaimedForRebuildInStableOrder()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(4443);\\\\n\\\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n\\\\n        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n        {\\\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n            {\\\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n\\\\n        var dirty = host.EnumerateDirtySubchunks()\\\\n            .Select(entry => (entry.Chunk.Coordinate, entry.SubchunkIndex))\\\\n            .ToList();\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.Equal(4, dirty.Count);\\\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 0), dirty[0]);\\\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), 1), dirty[1]);\\\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), 1), dirty[2]);\\\\n        Assert.Equal((new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), 1), dirty[3]);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var firstChunk, out var firstSubchunkIndex));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(firstChunk);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), firstChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(0, firstSubchunkIndex);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var secondChunk, out var secondSubchunkIndex));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(secondChunk);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0), secondChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, secondSubchunkIndex);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, out var firstSnapshot));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(firstSnapshot);\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(firstChunk.Coordinate.X, firstChunk.Coordinate.Z, firstSubchunkIndex, firstSnapshot!.Revision, firstSnapshot.BuildVersion));\\\\n        Assert.False(firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).IsDirty);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Built, firstChunk.GetSubchunk(firstSubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var thirdChunk, out var thirdSubchunkIndex));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(thirdChunk);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), thirdChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, thirdSubchunkIndex);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out var fourthChunk, out var fourthSubchunkIndex));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(fourthChunk);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), fourthChunk!.Coordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, fourthSubchunkIndex);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunk(out _, out _));\\\\n        Assert.False(host.TryMarkSubchunkMeshBuilt(99, 99, 0, 1, 0));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void ClaimNextDirtyCanReturnAReadyMeshingSnapshotInStableOrder()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(4447);\\\\n\\\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n        var southChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 1);\\\\n\\\\n        foreach (var chunk in new[] { originChunk, eastChunk, southChunk })\\\\n        {\\\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n            {\\\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 15, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n\\\\n        var claimedSnapshots = new List<SubchunkMeshingSnapshot>();\\\\n        while (host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var snapshot))\\\\n        {\\\\n            Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\\\n            claimedSnapshots.Add(snapshot!);\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.Equal(4, claimedSnapshots.Count);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 0),    Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[1].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(0, 1), claimedSnapshots[2].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[2].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), claimedSnapshots[3].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, claimedSnapshots[3].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n\\\\n        foreach (var snapshot in claimedSnapshots)\\\\n        {\\\\n            Assert.Equal(SubchunkMeshState.Queued, host.GetOrCreateChunk(snapshot.ChunkCoordinate.X, snapshot.ChunkCoordinate.Z).GetSubchunk(snapshot.SubchunkIndex).MeshState);\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.False(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out _));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void ClaimNextDirtySnapshotResultsStillRejectStaleRevisions()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(4448);\\\\n\\\\n        var chunk = [Fact]\\\\n    public void BuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputCanBeRetrievedAfterSuccessfulCompletion()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(4452);\\\\n\\\\n        var host.Initialize(4459);\\\\n\\\\n        var westChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n        var scheduler = new chunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n\\\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n            {\\\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        host.SetBlock(-15, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n        host.SetBlock(1, 17, 1, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, scheduler.ProcessDirtySubchunkSnapshots(host, 1));\\\\n\\\\n        var firstPassOutputs = host.EnumerateBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputs().ToList();\\\\n        Assert.Single(firstPassOutputs);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(-1, 0), firstPassOutputs[0].ChunkCoordinate);\\\\n        Assert.Equal(0, firstPassOutputs[0].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.Equal(1, scheduler.ProcessDirtySubchunkSnapshots(host, 1));\\\\n\\\\n       Assert.Equal(1, secondPassOutputs[1].SubchunkIndex);\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void BuiltMeshingOutputsCanBeDrainedOnceInStableChunkSubchunkOrder()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host.EnumerateBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutputs().Count());\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void RendererPickupLoopConsumesSchedulerBuiltOutputsInOnePass()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(4458);\\\\n\\\\n        var westChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(-1, 0);\\\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n        var scheduler = new WorldMeshingScheduler();\\\\n\\\\n        foreach (var chunk in new[] { westChunk, originChunk })\\\\n        {\\\\n            chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n            chunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n\\\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n            {\\\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        host.SetBlock(-15, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n        host.SetBlock(1, 17, 1, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.Equal(2, scheduler.ProcessDirtySubchunkSnapshots(host));\\\\n\\\\n        var renderer = new RendererHost();\\\\n        renderer.Initialize();\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.Equal(2, secondUploadedOutput));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(secondUploadedOutput);\\\\n        Assert.False(host.TryDrainNextBuiltSubchunkMeshingOutput(out _));\\\\n        Assert.Equal(0,    chunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n            chunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n\\\\n            foreach (var subchunk in chunk.Subchunks)\\\\n            {\\\\n                subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n            }\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        game.World.SetBlock(-15, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n        game.World.SetBlock(1, 17, 1, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n\\\\n host.SetBlock(1, 1, 1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryClaimNextDirtySubchunkSnapshot(out var snapshot));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\\\n\\\\n        var validOutput = Assert.True(host.TryCompleteSubchunkMeshing(snapshot!, validOutput));\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    [Fact]\\\\n    public void MeshingSnapshotCapturesSeamDataAcrossChunkAndSubchunkBoundaries()\\\\n    {\\\\n        var host = new WorldHost();\\\\n        host.Initialize(4445);\\\\n\\\\n        var originChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(0, 0);\\\\n        var eastChunk = host.GetOrCreateChunk(1, 0);\\\\n\\\\n        originChunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n        originChunk.GetSubchunk(1).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n        eastChunk.GetSubchunk(0).Fill(BlockId.Air);\\\\n\\\\n        foreach (var subchunk in new[] { originChunk.GetSubchunk(0), originChunk.GetSubchunk(1), eastChunk.GetSubchunk(0) })\\\\n        {\\\\n            subchunk.MarkMeshBuilt();\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 15, 0, BlockId.Stone);\\\\n        host.SetBlock(16, 15, 0, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\n        host.SetBlock(15, 16, 0, BlockId.Grass);\\\\n\\\\n        Assert.True(host.TryBuildSubchunkMeshingSnapshot(0, 0, 0, out var snapshot));\\\\n        Assert.NotNull(snapshot);\\\\n\\\\n        var visibleFaces = SubchunkMeshing.BuildVisibleFaces(snapshot!);\\\\n        var targetFaces = visibleFaces.Where(face => face.WorldX == 15 && face.WorldY == 15 && face.WorldZ == 0).ToList();\\\\n        var worldTargetFaces = SubchunkMeshing.EnumerateVisibleFaces(host, originChunk, 0)\\\\n            .Where(face => face.WorldX == 15 && face.WorldY == 15 && face.WorldZ == 0)\\\\n 10, 16, BlockId.Grass);\\\\\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(-1, 9, -1, BlockId.Stone);\\\\\\\\n+        host.SetBlock(-1, 10, -1, BlockId.Dirt);\\\\\\\\n+\\\\\\\\n+        var eastNeighbor = host.GetNeighbor(15, 10, 15, BlockFace.PositiveX);\\\\\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new ChunkCoordinate(1, 0), eastNeighbor.ChunkCoordinate);\\\\\\\\n+        Assert.Equal(new LocalBlockCoordinate(0, 10,
